parameters.Description_ZH: 模擬非加壓機艙或高海拔運輸環境
parameters.Description_EN: Simulates non-pressurized cargo bay or high-altitude transport

tests.Condition: Maintain 57.2 kPa for minimum 1 hour

parameters.Description_ZH: 模擬設備於高海拔地區正常運作
parameters.Description_EN: Simulates equipment operation at high altitude
parameters.Altitude: 4,572 m (15,000 ft) or per system spec

tests.Condition: Functional test while at minimum pressure

parameters.Description_ZH: 模擬飛機加壓艙突然破裂 (爆發性減壓)
parameters.Description_EN: Simulates explosive decompression of pressurized cabin

tests.Condition: Rapid drop from 8,000ft to 40,000ft within 15 seconds
tests.Pass Criteria: No hazardous debris; function restored after repressurization

parameters.Description_ZH: 多數地區標準高溫倉儲 (氣候區 A2, Table 501.7-II)。此為精密 24 小時晝夜循環曲線 (Diurnal Cycle)，重複 7 次。
parameters.Description_EN: Standard hot storage for most worldwide locations (Table 501.7-II). 24-hour diurnal cycle repeated 7 times.

parameters.Description_ZH: 極端沙漠氣候高溫倉儲 (中東、北非氣候區 A1)。精密 24 小時晝夜曲線，高溫輻射烤箱效應極強。
parameters.Description_EN: Extreme desert climate storage – Middle East, North Africa. 24-hour diurnal cycle.

parameters.Description_ZH: 標準高溫運作環境
parameters.Description_EN: Standard hot operational environment

tests.Condition: Temperature rate of change < 2.0°C/hour
Operate at peak temperature for minimum 2 hours

parameters.Description_ZH: 標準低溫倉儲 (歐洲、北美北部、日韓等地)。日夜溫差循環 24 小時曲線。
parameters.Description_EN: Standard cold storage diurnal cycle – Europe/North America (Table 502.7-I).

parameters.Description_ZH: 嚴寒低溫倉儲 (阿拉斯加、西伯利亞、北極圈邊緣)。日夜溫差循環 24 小時曲線。
parameters.Description_EN: Severe cold diurnal cycle – Alaska, Siberia, Northern Canada.

parameters.Description_ZH: 標準低溫開機與持續運作 (Constant Temperature 恆溫開機法)
parameters.Description_EN: Standard cold start and continuous operation (Methodology: Constant Temp).

tests.Condition: Soak at -32°C until stabilized, then power ON
Maintain operation and monitor functions

parameters.Description_ZH: 模擬設備僅經歷一次極端溫度轉換
parameters.Description_EN: One-way extreme temperature transfer simulation

tests.Condition: Transfer from T-initial to T-final within 1 min
Hold at T-final until thermally stabilized

parameters.Description_ZH: 模擬航空運輸或極端環境中的快速溫變 (3次循環)
parameters.Description_EN: Rapid temperature change in aviation/extreme environments (3 cycles)

tests.Action: Transfer from -51°C to 71°C within 1 min, hold until stabilized
Conduct visual and functional test after 3 full cycles

parameters.Description_ZH: 模擬設備偶爾暴露於化學流體 (潤滑油、燃料、清潔劑)
parameters.Description_EN: Occasional fluid exposure – lubricants, fuels, cleaners
parameters.Fluid Temperature: Standard Ambient or Specific Operating Temp
parameters.Exposure Time: 8 to 24 hours depending on fluid type

tests.Condition: Apply specified fluid to completely cover vulnerable surfaces
Maintain at test temperature for 8 hours
Inspect for material degradation, swelling, or structural failure

parameters.Description_ZH: 評估太陽輻射產生的熱效應。除了全光譜 1,120 W/m² 以外，嚴格規定了紅外/紫外/可見光的能量佔比。
parameters.Description_EN: Evaluate solar thermal effects. Strict spectral energy distribution enforcement.

tests.Energy Limits: Varies by hour (Peak irradiance at noon)

parameters.Description_ZH: 評估太陽輻射造成的化學/光化學破壞 (褪色、塑膠脆化)
parameters.Description_EN: Chemical/photochemical degradation – fading, plastic embrittlement

tests.Condition: 20 hours of continuous irradiance per cycle
4 hours of darkness per cycle

parameters.Description_ZH: 模擬戶外設備遭遇狂風暴雨的環境
parameters.Description_EN: Outdoor equipment exposure to wind-driven rain

tests.Condition: Continuous spray with specified wind velocity

parameters.Description_ZH: 模擬有遮蔽環境中上方冷凝水或輕微漏水的滴落
parameters.Description_EN: Condensation or minor leak drip in sheltered environments
parameters.Water Pressure: Falling from 1 m above test item

tests.Condition: Subject item to steady drip for 15 minutes
Verify no water pooling or ingress

parameters.Description_ZH: 模擬自然氣候中日夜溫濕度緩慢變化 (Table 507.6-I)
parameters.Description_EN: Natural 24-hour temperature/humidity variation (Table 507.6-I)
parameters.Cycle Profile: Continuous 24-hour variation tracking real-world climatic data
parameters.Test Duration: Up to 45 cycles (1,080 hours) for severe environments

tests.Condition: Follow 24-hr temperature/humidity profile (e.g., B3 Damp Tropical)

parameters.Description_ZH: 加速驗證產品對濕氣穿透與腐蝕的抵抗力
parameters.Description_EN: Accelerated moisture penetration and corrosion resistance validation

tests.Condition: 30°C to 60°C over 2 hours, RH > 95%
Maintain 60°C at 95% RH for 6 hours
60°C to 30°C over 8 hours, RH > 85%
Maintain 30°C at 95% RH for 8 hours

parameters.Description_ZH: 評估設備材質是否支持黴菌生長並導致功能損壞
parameters.Description_EN: Assess whether materials support mold growth causing functional damage

tests.Condition: Spray mixed spore suspension evenly over test item
Maintain 30°C and >95% RH for 28 days
Visual inspection by trained mycologist (do not clean before inspection)

parameters.Description_ZH: 加速評估保護塗層與表面處理的抗腐蝕能力
parameters.Description_EN: Accelerated evaluation of protective coatings corrosion resistance

tests.Condition: 24 hours continuous salt fog spray
24 hours at standard ambient conditions
Repeat for total of 2 cycles (96 hours)

parameters.Description_ZH: 模擬設備在乾燥微塵環境中的運作與防塵能力 (< 149 μm)
parameters.Description_EN: Operation in dry fine dust environment (< 149 μm particles)

tests.Condition: 6 hours at standard ambient temperature
6 hours at high operating temperature

parameters.Description_ZH: 模擬強風捲起較大沙粒的侵蝕與穿透效應 (150–850 μm)
parameters.Description_EN: Wind-driven coarse sand erosion and penetration (150–850 μm)

tests.Condition: 90 minutes per vulnerable face

parameters.Description_ZH: 驗證設備在充滿易燃油氣的環境中不會引燃爆炸
parameters.Description_EN: Verify equipment will not ignite explosive atmosphere during operation
parameters.Altitude Limits: Site ambient up to 12,192 m (40,000 ft)
parameters.Temperature: Maximum operating temperature of test item

tests.Condition: Introduce explosive mixture at simulated altitudes
Operate test item, actuating all switches and contacts
Detonate mixture at end of test to verify it was explosive

parameters.Description_ZH: 模擬設備部分或完全浸入水中的密封性 (Method 編號升版 512.5→512.6)
parameters.Description_EN: Seal integrity when partially or fully submerged (updated from 512.5)

tests.Condition: Heat test item to establish temperature differential
Submerge for 30 minutes, observe for bubbles/leaks

parameters.Description_ZH: 模擬航空器高G力轉向時的結構與功能承受力 (Method 513.6→513.7)
parameters.Description_EN: Structural/functional integrity under high-G maneuvers (updated from 513.6)
parameters.Acceleration Level: Dependent on aircraft type (e.g., 9G for fighters)

tests.Condition: Maintain G-level for 1 minute while operating
Maintain G-level for 1 minute while operating
Maintain G-level for 1 minute while operating

parameters.Description_ZH: 一般輪型車輛路面運輸 (固定貨) – Method 514.7→514.8 (Figure 514.8C-1)
parameters.Description_EN: Ground vehicle road transport, secured cargo (updated Fig. 514.8C-1)

parameters.Description_ZH: 噴射貨機運輸環境 (Figure 514.8D-1)
parameters.Description_EN: Jet cargo transport environment (Figure 514.8D-1)

parameters.Description_ZH: 車載設備越野或顛簸路面震動 (Figure 514.8E-1)
parameters.Description_EN: Ground mobile equipment off-road vibration (Figure 514.8E-1)

tests.Profile: 0.02 g²/Hz at 5 Hz to 0.002 at 500 Hz
0.004 g²/Hz at 5 Hz to 0.001 at 500 Hz
0.006 g²/Hz at 5 Hz to 0.002 at 500 Hz

parameters.Description_ZH: 最低基本完整性測試，確保基本組裝品質 (Figure 514.8E-1)
parameters.Description_EN: Minimum baseline integrity test for general assemblies (Figure 514.8E-1)

tests.Profile: 0.04 g²/Hz (20–1,000 Hz), -6 dB/oct rolloff to 2,000 Hz

parameters.Description_ZH: 未固定鬆散貨物在車輛運輸中的彈跳與碰撞測試 (Figure 514.8C-4)
parameters.Description_EN: Unrestrained loose cargo bounce and collision in transport (Figure 514.8C-4)
parameters.Motion: 25.4 mm (1.0 inch) peak-to-peak circular synchronous motion

tests.Condition: Item must be free to bounce, strike bed, and collide with fences

parameters.Description_ZH: 模擬設備暴露於高強度聲波場 (飛機引擎、火箭發射) 引起的疲勞
parameters.Description_EN: High-intensity acoustic field exposure – aircraft engines, rocket launch

tests.Condition: Subject to broad-band random acoustic noise field
Check for acoustic-induced fatigue and component chafing

parameters.Description_ZH: 模擬設備運作時可能遭遇的碰撞衝擊 (Method 516.7→516.8)
parameters.Description_EN: Operational shock during use – structural and functional integrity (updated 516.7→516.8)

tests.Condition: +X (3 shocks), -X (3 shocks) while operating
+Y (3 shocks), -Y (3 shocks) while operating
+Z (3 shocks), -Z (3 shocks) while operating

parameters.Description_ZH: 模擬設備在物流搬運過程中的意外跌落 (Table 516.8-VI)
parameters.Description_EN: Accidental drop during logistics handling (Table 516.8-VI)

parameters.Description_ZH: 確保載具墜毀時設備不脫落成為高速拋射物
parameters.Description_EN: Prevent equipment becoming projectile during vehicle crash

tests.Condition: Apply crash profile to mounting points
Verify equipment remains captive on mounts; no hazardous parts shed

parameters.Description_ZH: 模擬設備在工作台上維修時的意外傾倒或滑落
parameters.Description_EN: Accidental tipping or sliding during bench maintenance
parameters.Drop Surface: Solid wood bench top ≥ 4.25 cm thick

tests.Condition: Raise opposite edge to 45° or balance point, drop freely
Raise opposite edge to 10 cm (4 inches), drop freely
Repeat for all practical edges on base face

parameters.Description_ZH: 模擬爆炸螺栓或火工品引爆產生的高頻高G值衝擊
parameters.Description_EN: High-frequency, high-G shock from pyrotechnic/explosive bolt firing

tests.Condition: Initiate pyrotechnic device in actual or mock-up structural configuration
High-speed transient acquisition (min 1M samples/sec)

parameters.Description_ZH: 評估設備在酸性氣體下的抗腐蝕與抗化學破壞能力
parameters.Description_EN: Corrosion resistance in acidic industrial/exhaust atmosphere

tests.Condition: 3 periods × 2 hours spraying + 22 hours storage
72 hours minimum

parameters.Description_ZH: 模擬機載或車載機砲連射產生的週期性強烈震動 (Method 519.7→519.8)
parameters.Description_EN: Periodic high-intensity vibration/shock from onboard cannon fire (updated 519.7→519.8)
parameters.Firing Rate: Repetitive pulse (20 to 100 Hz per gun firing rate)
parameters.Duration: Equivalent to actual mission firing time

tests.Condition: Apply specified gunfire shock response spectrum (SRS)

parameters.Description_ZH: 模擬飛行器任務中同時遭遇溫度、濕度、震動與氣壓的複合環境
parameters.Description_EN: Simultaneous temperature, humidity, vibration, and altitude per mission profile

tests.Condition: Simultaneous application of vibration, thermal, and altitude stress
Continuously operate and monitor during cycle

parameters.Description_ZH: 驗證設備在結冰環境下的操作與解凍效能
parameters.Description_EN: Verify operation and de-icing in icing environments
parameters.Ice Thickness: 13 mm (0.5 in) general; up to 75 mm (3 in) marine

tests.Condition: Stabilize test item below freezing
Spray super-cooled water until desired thickness
Operate equipment or deploy de-icing mechanisms

parameters.Description_ZH: 模擬裝甲車輛遭受非貫穿性彈砲擊中時的高頻破壞性衝擊
parameters.Description_EN: High-frequency shock from non-penetrating ballistic impact on armor
parameters.Shock Level: Very high momentum exchange; SRS often > 10,000 g at high frequencies
parameters.Simulator: Ballistic shock machine (BSM) or light gas gun

tests.Condition: Apply specified SRS profile to item mounting points
Verify structural integrity; no hazardous fragment shedding

parameters.Description_ZH: 掛載於軍機外部的裝備，綜合氣動噪音、震動與氣動加熱的破壞
parameters.Description_EN: External aircraft stores – combined aero-noise, vibration, and aerodynamic heating
parameters.Acoustic: Engine exhaust and boundary layer noise

tests.Condition: Simultaneous application of three stresses per mission profile

parameters.Description_ZH: 模擬水分滲入縫隙後結冰膨脹再融化產生的物理結構破壞
parameters.Description_EN: Physical damage from moisture freezing and thawing in crevices

tests.Condition: Repeated transition between freezing and thawing
Inspect for cracked seals, housing separation, component distortion

parameters.Description_ZH: 將實地錄製的複雜時域波形直接在振動台上重播 (Method 525.1→525.2)
parameters.Description_EN: Replicate real field-measured time waveforms on vibration table (updated 525.1→525.2)

tests.Condition: Determine system transfer function using low-level random
Iteratively correct drive signal to match target field waveform

parameters.Description_ZH: 模擬火車車廂在調車場連結作業時的劇烈縱向撞擊
parameters.Description_EN: Longitudinal impact during railcar humping/coupling operations

tests.Condition: Subject to specified impact velocity in both longitudinal directions

parameters.Description_ZH: 多軸多激振器同步測試，模擬比單軸更真實的3D複合動態破壞 (Method 527.1→527.2)
parameters.Description_EN: Simultaneous multi-axis excitation for realistic 3D dynamic stress (updated 527.1→527.2)

tests.Condition: Simultaneous control of phase and amplitude across multiple shakers

parameters.Description_ZH: 美國海軍水面艦與潛艦搭載設備的長期環境與螺旋槳激振力 (Method 528.1→528.2)
parameters.Description_EN: US Navy surface ship and submarine equipment environmental vibration (updated 528.1→528.2)
parameters.Amplitude: Displacement controlled (e.g., up to 0.030 inches single amplitude)
parameters.Excitation Source: Ship propulsion systems and wave action

tests.Condition: Identify resonances between 4 to 50 Hz
Sweep and dwell at identified resonant frequencies
2 hours per axis at resonant point

parameters.Description_ZH: 【810H 新增】模擬溫帶地區（非熱帶）中低強度降雨的密封與功能測試
parameters.Description_EN: 【NEW in 810H】Seal and function test for moderate rainfall in temperate (non-tropical) climates
parameters.Rainfall Rate: 0.5 to 4 mm/min (Method 506.6 covers tropical; this covers temperate)

tests.Condition: Subject to temperate rain profile for minimum 30 minutes
Operate equipment during and after exposure
Inspect for water ingress at all seals and connectors
